label: Disaster
description: Natural disasters including floods, earthquakes, cyclones, and landslides
steps: Move to higher ground immediately during floods
Drop, cover, and hold on during an earthquake
Tune in to local disaster alerts and government broadcasts
Call NDRF helpline 1078 or dial 112 for rescue
Evacuate to the nearest designated shelter if instructed
guidance: Prepare an emergency kit: water, food, flashlight, first aid
Avoid driving or walking through floodwaters
Stay away from damaged buildings and power lines after earthquakes
Register at relief camps so family can locate you
